title: Upload FIles to files gallery via form submission
excerpt: I’d love to have the ability to add a files upload field to forms that would upload directly to the files gallery rather than to a files column.

posts.author: jthorn (Josiah Thorngate)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d love to have the ability to add a files upload field to forms that would upload directly to the files gallery rather than to a files column.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Josiah,

As long that files column is selected in the file gallery settings, those files uploaded via the forms should appear in the gallery.

Screen Shot 2023-11-29 at 1.59.09 pm1325×627 37.9 KB

Let me know if I am misunderstanding

posts.author: jthorn (Josiah Thorngate)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yeah, what I’m looking for is a way to add files to an item without a file column at all. Like, I can upload files directly to the gallery for an existing item:

image.png1054×1076 60.2 KB

I want to be able to do the same thing via a form submission. Thanks!
